_publications._publicationTitle: Synergistic Suppression of NF1 Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumor Cell Growth in Culture and Orthotopic Xenografts by Combinational Treatment with Statin and Prodrug Farnesyltransferase Inhibitor PAMAM G4 Dendrimers.

_contextSnippet: Cultures exposed to 5 μM of IG 2 (but not 0.5 or 1.0 μM) accumulated non-prenylated RAB5A...and non-prenylated RAP1A...These accumulations occurred within 4 h of treatment
details: 5 μM IG2 accumulated non-prenylated RAB5A and RAP1A within 4 h of treatment, while 0.5 or 1.0 μM had no effect
